text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Yaeno Muteki has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm cleaning my office when I happen to notice an
open envelope sitting on a corner of my desk.
choice_data_list: Oh! It's the coupon for the hot spring vacation!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh right, the prize from the raffle. You should put
it to good use, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Didn't we promise to go together?
Didn't we promise to go together?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You remember that? It was such an offhand
promise, I figured you would've forgotten...
choice_data_list:
And just so we're clear, this is for relaxation.
Not training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki mentioned treating the hot spring
vacation as a new training opportunity, but I'm
not going to let that happen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She already trains too much as it is. I want to
make sure she actually gets some rest at the hot
spring.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Heh, understood. Let's take it easy, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're blessed with clear skies for the trip, and
even though she doesn't say it, I can tell that
Yaeno Muteki is enjoying the outing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That was relaxing. All the tension in my
muscles is gone and my body feels lighter.
choice_data_list: Sigh... My shoulders and back feel good as new!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You certainly look well rested. And your posture
is—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hm? Your posture is still unbalanced...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Let's see if we can fix that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We relocate to the beach near the inn. Yaeno
Muteki has me do some stretches, then checks my
balance standing on one leg, among other things.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Good. You seem fine as far as I can tell.
choice_data_list: This is refreshing. It's like you're my trainer.
This is refreshing. It's like you're my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That's true. But all I'm doing is using the
knowledge I gained from you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think of it, you've taught me quite a
lot.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You know...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Considering how difficult I can be, it's incredible
you haven't given up on me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm truly impressed by your patience.
choice_data_list: I've never thought of you as difficult.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only have I never felt that she was a bother, I
can't recall ever having to force myself to put up
with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her what a hard worker she's been and how I
appreciate that she's always responded to my
instructions with such earnestness.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've just realized why I'm so docile in your
presence, despite my wild temperament.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It's because...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You're an individual of unparalleled virtue.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Considering that I've had the greatest trainer of
all by my side the entire time, then... Yes, it all
makes sense now!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Not in the slightest! You ought to be more
conscious of your own worth.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It won't be long before people take notice of
your noble nature and—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But wait, that's not a good thing.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You are utterly indispensable to me. There's no
one else who can keep me in check.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No matter how desperately others may plead for
your guidance, I cannot let you yield to them.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Why are you grinning like that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to stay mum on the topic since she's still
unaware. No doubt she'll try to deflect things the
moment she realizes the real reason.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hm... So you really won't tell me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Then let's do some katas. Perhaps that
way I can learn what you're hiding.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When it was decided that Yaeno Muteki and I
were to work together as racer and trainer, she
tried her best to convey her feelings to me
through a display of martial arts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she wants us to express our feelings and deepen
our understanding of each other, then I'll gladly
oblige.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Now, let's begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Yaeno Muteki and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
